title: Ecpoma gigantostipula
taxonomy: Ecpoma gigantostipula is classified as a species of moth in the family Erebidae. It belongs to the subfamily Arctiinae, commonly known as tiger moths. The Ecpoma gigantostipula is further categorized under the tribe Arctiini, a group of moths known for their distinctive stripes and vibrant colors. This classification places Ecpoma gigantostipula within the order Lepidoptera, which includes butterflies and moths. The genus Ecpoma is part of the larger group of moths that are primarily nocturnal and have a worldwide distribution.
